channel.title: Combinatorics on Jasper's Technical Notebook
channel.description: Recent content in Combinatorics on Jasper's Technical Notebook

item.title: Combinatorics: Order Theory — Chromatic Polynomials, Chordal Graphs, Order Polynomials, Dilworth & Hall
item.description: Chromatic polynomial, chordal/interval graphs, PEO product formula, order polynomials (chain/antichain/tree/DAG/divisor lattice), MacMahon formula, Dilworth, Mirsky, Hall’s marriage theorem, Erdős–Szekeres, missile interception.

item.title: Combinatorics #2-ex1: Difference (Correlation) Convolution
item.description: Cross-correlation via ordinary convolution: reverse-A and reverse-B extraction methods, derivation, and Ring Trick II (cyclic shift score maximisation via difference convolution).

item.title: Combinatorics #2-ex2: Cyclic Convolution
item.description: Cyclic convolution definition, FFT/NTT implementation for n=2^k, zero-padding, why n must be a power of two, and the fold-back technique for arbitrary n.

item.title: Combinatorics #2.1: FFT and Lagrange Interpolation
item.description: Polynomial representations, FFT/DFT over complex numbers, Triple Sums, Fuzzy Search (difference convolution), FFT template, Lagrange interpolation (O(n²) and O(n) equidistant), sum of k-th powers, Assigning Prizes polynomial DP.

item.title: Combinatorics #2.2: Primitive Roots, Discrete Logarithm, NTT, Divide-and-Conquer NTT
item.description: Order and primitive roots (Euler’s theorem, BSGS, exBSGS), discrete index as logarithm analogue, SGU 261 Discrete Roots, NTT theory and templates, divide-and-conquer NTT (product tree), Wannafly D team selection, Nowcoder 50F generating functions.

item.title: Combinatorics #3.1: Ordinary Generating Functions
item.description: Formal power series basics, ordinary generating functions, inversion identities, generalized binomial expansions, bounded counting examples, and recurrence-to-closed-form examples such as Fibonacci and Catalan.

item.title: Combinatorics #3.2: More Operations on Formal Power Series
item.description: Newton iteration for polynomial inverse and square root, derivative/integral/composition of formal power series, logarithm and exponential of series, and worked examples including CF438E and a bad-modulus complete-knapsack generating function.

item.title: Combinatorics #1.1: Permutations and Combinations
item.description: Hockey Stick identity, addition/multiplication principles, binomial identities, example problems: bitonic sequences, multiset permutations, multi-layer coloring DP, CCPC Subpermutation.

item.title: Combinatorics D1: Diophantine Equations
item.description: Stars and bars, bounded Diophantine equations via inclusion-exclusion, prefix-sum DP, D&C NTT, equal-cap formula, and a full worked example on CF 2127F.

item.title: Combinatorics #0: Common Formulae & Conclusions
item.description: A compact toolkit of geometric sums, floor-sum transformations, XOR facts, Fibonacci identities, and perfect-square patterns.

item.title: Combinatorics #0.1: 计数中常用的结论
item.description: 常见计数结论、Lucas 定理、不定方程解计数、平面分拆、DAG 路径计数、多项式平移、XOR 均匀性与若干竞赛常用结论。

item.title: Combinatorics #1.2: Inclusion-Exclusion, Bounded Diophantine Equations, and Derangements
item.description: Inclusion-exclusion in set and operator form, equal-count subproblems, bounded Diophantine counting, derangements, Stirling numbers, and selected contest problems.
